title: fix: use correct API version for gptimage edits endpoint
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: GPT image edits, restored
gist.blurb: We squashed a routing bug that was causing 404 errors when trying to edit images with the GPT model. The img2img pipeline is back to its fully functional, pixel-perfect self.
gist.summary: Fixed an API versioning mismatch that caused 404 errors when using the gptimage model for image-to-image edits.
gist.impact: Users can once again successfully use the gptimage model with an image input parameter to modify existing images.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee fixing a broken painting or adjusting a canvas with a wrench, representing the restoration of the image editing (img2img) feature. Nomnom eating the 404 error.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, using a glowing wrench to fix a beautiful framed painting on a wooden easel. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby, happily eating a crumpled paper that says '404'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
